flashcards.definition: Eliminating a risk entirely by not engaging in the activity (don't own a boat = no boat liability).
Taking steps to decrease the probability or impact of a risk (security system, healthy habits).
Shifting financial risk to another party, typically through insurance (pay premium → insurer absorbs loss).
Accepting a risk and self-insuring — viable for small, manageable risks (choosing a high deductible).
Probability of an event × its financial impact; used to decide whether to insure against a risk.
